name: Environmental
body: Food sovereignty, land stewardship, agriculture, and anti-food-apartheid infrastructure.

name: Economic
body: Business formation, government contracting, cooperative ownership, and circular economics.

name: Educational
body: Private education, STEM, emerging technologies, leadership, and lineage-centered curriculum.

name: Engagement
body: Civic education, public policy literacy, media, storytelling, and mobilization.

name: Emancipated
body: The unfinished obligations of freedom. Documented obligations become policy.
